extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates Against and By rows: I counted criminal proceedings only in Against rows (Company Nil, Subsidiaries Nil, Directors Nil, Promoters Nil), statutory/regulatory actions only in Against rows (82 + 5 + 5 + 5), and tax proceedings only for the Company and Subsidiaries (13 + 15); all By rows and promoter/director personal tax matters were excluded. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is taken from the Against rows, ₹459.64 million + ₹67.63 million = ₹527.27 million, or ₹52.727 crore; non-quantifiable matters are excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as of December 31, 2022; no stated Total row is provided, so the disclosed line items were summed: ₹33.16 million + ₹568.01 million + ₹80.45 million = ₹681.62 million, or ₹68.162 crore. The concentration disclosures are not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer percentages for a full fiscal year, so both concentration fields are null; the reported percentages elsewhere use revenue from operations or total income but are not applicable to top-customer concentration. The source monetary tables use ₹ in millions, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹10 million = ₹1 crore).
